lines.english: Why doesn't Aunt Jennifer tell anyone how old she is?
lines.chinese: 珍妮弗姨妈为什么不告诉任何人她多大了？
lines.raw: Why doesn't Aunt Jennifer tell anyone how old she is? | 珍妮弗姨妈为什么不告诉任何人她多大了？

lines.english: My aunt Jennifer is an actress.
lines.chinese: 我的珍妮弗姨妈是个演员。
lines.raw: My aunt Jennifer is an actress. | 我的珍妮弗姨妈是个演员。

lines.english: She must be at least thirty-five years old.
lines.raw: She must be at least thirty-five years old. | 她肯定至少35岁了。

lines.english: In spite of this, she often appears on the stage as a young girl.
lines.chinese: 尽管如此，她还是经常在舞台上扮演一个年轻姑娘。
lines.raw: In spite of this, she often appears on the stage as a young girl. | 尽管如此，她还是经常在舞台上扮演一个年轻姑娘。

lines.english: Jennifer will have to take part in a new play soon.
lines.chinese: 珍妮弗很快就要参加一个新剧的演出了。
lines.raw: Jennifer will have to take part in a new play soon. | 珍妮弗很快就要参加一个新剧的演出了。

lines.english: This time, she will be a girl of seventeen.
lines.chinese: 这次，她将扮演一个17岁的姑娘。
lines.raw: This time, she will be a girl of seventeen. | 这次，她将扮演一个17岁的姑娘。

lines.english: In the play, she must appear in a bright red dress and long black stockings.
lines.chinese: 在剧中，她必须穿一件鲜红的连衣裙和一双长长的黑丝袜。
lines.raw: In the play, she must appear in a bright red dress and long black stockings. | 在剧中，她必须穿一件鲜红的连衣裙和一双长长的黑丝袜。
Last year in another play, | 去年在另一个剧中，

lines.english: she had to wear short socks and a bright, orange-coloured dress.
lines.chinese: 她不得不穿短袜和一件鲜艳的橙色连衣裙。
lines.raw: she had to wear short socks and a bright, orange-coloured dress. | 她不得不穿短袜和一件鲜艳的橙色连衣裙。

lines.english: If anyone ever asks her how old she is,
lines.chinese: 如果有人问起她多大了，
lines.raw: If anyone ever asks her how old she is, | 如果有人问起她多大了，

lines.english: she always answers, 'Darling, it must be terrible to be grown up!'
lines.chinese: 她总是回答说：“亲爱的，长大成人真是太可怕了！”
lines.raw: she always answers, 'Darling, it must be terrible to be grown up!' | 她总是回答说：“亲爱的，长大成人真是太可怕了！”
